name: yandex-wiki-search-mcp
description: MCP server for Yandex Wiki with full-text search

tools.name: page_search
tools.description: Full-text search across the entire Yandex Wiki

tools.name: page_get_grids
tools.description: Get dynamic tables attached to a Yandex Wiki page

tools.name: grid_get
tools.description: Get a Yandex Wiki dynamic table by grid ID

tools.name: page_get
tools.description: Get a Yandex Wiki page by page_id or slug

tools.name: page_get_descendants
tools.description: Get a subtree of Yandex Wiki pages

tools.name: page_get_comments
tools.description: Get comments for a Yandex Wiki page

tools.name: page_get_resources
tools.description: Get resources linked to a Yandex Wiki page

tools.name: page_get_attachments
tools.description: Get attachments for a Yandex Wiki page

tools.name: grid_create
tools.description: Create a Yandex Wiki dynamic table on a page

tools.name: grid_update
tools.description: Update a Yandex Wiki dynamic table

tools.name: grid_delete
tools.description: Delete a Yandex Wiki dynamic table

tools.name: grid_copy
tools.description: Copy a Yandex Wiki dynamic table to an existing target page

tools.name: grid_add_rows
tools.description: Add rows to a Yandex Wiki dynamic table

tools.name: grid_delete_rows
tools.description: Delete rows from a Yandex Wiki dynamic table

tools.name: grid_update_cells
tools.description: Update cells in a Yandex Wiki dynamic table

tools.name: grid_add_columns
tools.description: Add columns to a Yandex Wiki dynamic table

tools.name: grid_delete_columns
tools.description: Delete columns from a Yandex Wiki dynamic table

tools.name: grid_move_rows
tools.description: Move a row inside a Yandex Wiki dynamic table

tools.name: grid_move_columns
tools.description: Move a column inside a Yandex Wiki dynamic table

tools.name: page_create
tools.description: Create a Yandex Wiki page

tools.name: page_update
tools.description: Update an existing Yandex Wiki page

tools.name: page_append_content
tools.description: Append content to a Yandex Wiki page

tools.name: page_add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a Yandex Wiki page

tools.name: page_delete
tools.description: Delete a Yandex Wiki page and return a recovery token

tools.name: page_recover
tools.description: Recover a deleted Yandex Wiki page

tools.name: page_upload_attachment
tools.description: Upload a local file and attach it to a Yandex Wiki page

wiki_token.title: Yandex Wiki Token
wiki_token.description: OAuth token for accessing the Yandex Wiki API

wiki_iam_token.title: Yandex IAM Token
wiki_iam_token.description: IAM token for service-to-service access to Yandex Wiki

wiki_cloud_org_id.title: Wiki Cloud Org Id
wiki_cloud_org_id.description: ID of Yandex Cloud organization linked to Wiki

wiki_org_id.title: Wiki Org Id
wiki_org_id.description: ID of Yandex 360 organization for Wiki access

wiki_read_only.title: Wiki Read Only
wiki_read_only.description: Disable all non-read MCP tools and request only read access when OAuth scopes are used
